full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What toy dataset from scikit-learn would be most appropriate for testing DP-means from the Kulis Jordan 2012 paper, and why?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Recommended make_blobs with isotropic Gaussians as the best fit for DP-means' spherical cluster assumption.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified that make_blobs generates isotropic Gaussians by reading sklearn documentation and Section 4 Eq. 9 of the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are the limitations of using make_blobs compared to the real-world datasets used in Kulis & Jordan 2012?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Identified that make_blobs lacks outliers, noise, high dimensionality, and class imbalance present in real datasets.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked Section 5 of the paper to identify the actual datasets used — image patches and speaker data confirmed.
